generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. Critics who push for isolationism don't understand the real threats we face. Our commitments abroad aren't just about helping others - they're about protecting our own way of life. The data shows that countries with strong alliances have 40% fewer security incidents. We can't afford to weaken our defenses by pulling back now. #NationalSecurityFirst #AllianceMatters
